All the four countries that have qualified for the Paris 2024 Olympics women’s football semifinals event have been confirmed.

The countries are Germany, Spain, the United States and Brazil.

This follows the conclusion of Saturday’s quarter-final stage fixtures.

The United States defeated Japan 1-0, while Spain won 4-2 on penalties against Colombia after the match ended in a 2-2 draw.

Germany also won 4-2 on penalties against Canada after the game ended in a 0-0 draw, while Brazil won 1-0 against France.

The semi-final fixtures will take place on Tuesday.

The United States will tackle Germany on Tuesday evening by 5pm, while Spain will face Brazil the same day by 8pm.
